objective: sketch a custom Circuit flow builder UI
prototype_scope: Create a small, disposable artifact under docs/release/proofs/runs/prototype/run/prototype-files that makes the requested idea inspectable.
out_of_scope: Deployment, branch preview, provider, or model claims
target_user: Operator inspecting whether the idea is worth carrying into Build
success_criteria: The prototype files exist under prototype_root
At least one entry point is reported
The result names evidence and limitations honestly
